source.title: Structural Damage - Crane/Other Lifting Device - Transocean Discoverer India

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - Keathley Canyon Block 770

event.top_event: Dropped drill pipe from aft pipe transfer conveyor
actions_taken: Emergency stop initiated by Assistant Driller
Quick Share alert issued to fleet
BSEE photographic documentation and evidence gathering
event.summary: At approximately 08:10 hours on 6 January 2016, a joint of drill pipe fell from the aft pipe transfer conveyor onto the aft pipe deck of the Transocean Discoverer India drill ship during drilling operations for Chevron U.S.A. in Keathley Canyon Block 770. The drill pipe became trapped under a utility cart during loading arm operations, causing it to roll and fall over handrails, creating a 5-inch diameter hole in the aft deck. No personnel injuries occurred due to area barricading. The incident resulted from failure to follow work risk assessment procedures, inadequate safety time-outs, and lack of hazard assessment for utility cart positioning.
recommendations: BSEE Lafayette District recommends that the Office of Safety Management issue a Safety Alert identifying potential hazards concerning positioning of utility carts relative to transfer conveyor loading arms that may result in falling objects
key_phrases: drill pipe fell from aft pipe transfer conveyor
box end trapped underneath utility cart
pin end elevated above loading arms
failure to follow work risk assessment procedures
absence of procedure for utility cart positioning
management of change process not followed

hazards.name: Dropped objects from elevated work areas
Inadequate work planning and hazard assessment

threats.name: Drill pipe becoming trapped under utility cart during loading operations
Loss of control of suspended drill pipe load
Failure to recognize hazard conflict between utility cart and conveyor loading arms

consequences.name: Structural damage to deck and handrails
Potential personnel injury or fatality from falling object

controls.name: Work Risk Assessment Procedure
controls.barrier_role: Identify hazards and control measures before work begins
controls.lod_basis: Established Transocean procedure for evaluating task hazards

supporting_text: failure to follow established Transocean work risk assessment procedures
failure to follow the job tasks stated in the written risk assessment
the absence of a procedure or work risk assessment associated with the utility cart positioning

controls.name: Safety Time-Out Process
controls.barrier_role: Pause operations when tasks or hazards change to reassess safety
controls.lod_basis: Industry standard safety practice for dynamic work environments

supporting_text: a safety time out was not utilized given the tasks and hazards had changed related to the tasks

controls.name: THINK Process - Hazard Recognition
controls.barrier_role: Identify and communicate hazard conflicts before operations resume
controls.lod_basis: Transocean safety procedure for hazard awareness

supporting_text: failure to implement the THINK process and to recognize the hazard conflict between the location of the utility cart relative to transfer conveyor pipe load arms

controls.name: Visual Inspection by Watchmen
controls.barrier_role: Verify work area safety and equipment condition before operations resume
controls.lod_basis: Transocean operational procedure for pre-operation verification

supporting_text: the Assistant Driller (AD) walked partially down the conveyor, performed a visual inspection of the aft transfer conveyor and pipe, and concluded that it was safe to resume operations
the watchmen did not adequately inspect the work area and verify that transferring drill pipe operations with the loading arms was safe to resume

controls.name: Management of Change Process
controls.barrier_role: Ensure adequate resources and procedures when operational scope changes
controls.lod_basis: Transocean management system for operational changes

supporting_text: crew members failed to follow the established Transocean management of change process since operations that required five crew members but only two crew members were available
an interruption during the operations of picking up the BHA to conduct running riser activities that led to an inadequate number of crew members required to conduct both operations

controls.name: Crew Handoff and Communication Procedure
controls.barrier_role: Ensure continuity of safety awareness and task understanding during crew transitions
controls.lod_basis: Transocean operational procedure for shift changes

supporting_text: inadequate handoff during crew changes after meal breaks

controls.name: Area Barricading and Access Control
controls.barrier_role: Prevent personnel access to hazardous areas during operations
controls.lod_basis: Transocean safety policy for hazardous work areas

supporting_text: Since the aft pipe deck below the aft transfer conveyor was barricaded off to personnel as per Transocean's policy, there were no injuries

controls.name: Emergency Stop System
controls.barrier_role: Halt suspended load operations when hazard is detected
controls.lod_basis: Equipment safety system for load control

supporting_text: The AD initiated an emergency stop with the drill pipe suspended above the loading arms; however, the drill pipe rolled to the port side and fell over the hand rails

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
